claim_summary: National AI pilot zones are coded at city/county level with designation years 2019-2021.
MIIT excellence-level smart-factory projects are parsed from 2024 and 2025 public lists.
City assignments split by official location rule-based inference and external evidence (Table 16).
Listed smart-factory recognition is concentrated in pilot-zone cities (resolved cities only).
Positive pilot-zone association in baseline city-year models (not controlled until EPS/NBS).
Model 4-7 with city economic controls (blocked until EPS/NBS ingestion).
Pilot coefficient attenuates substantially outside mega-hubs and direct-admin municipalities supporting hub-centered diffusion.
Adoption clusters by diffusion-state city type not pilot binary alone.
Ex ante city capacity typology without top smart-factory city labels.
Province-year pilot-province association as coarse robustness (non-pilot cities in pilot provinces).
Pre-2024 bins are mechanical; figure is timing diagnostic only, not pre-trend validation.
Pre-treatment balance and matched-sample adoption (requires city controls).
Pilot heterogeneity by ex ante industry AI exposure (preferred spec).
Smart-factory sectors overlap advanced export basket (log cumulative growth 2017-2024).
Do not claim average pilot-zone treatment effect across treated cities.
